Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DAVID S. ZALOB, ESQ., 415.788.2465, FOR PLAINTIFF SYDNEY GUREWITZ CLEMENS.
NANCY E. LOFDAHL, ESQ., 415.314.7088, FOR DEFENDANT CONLAN PRESS, INC.

RULING: Argued and the Court vacated its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF SYDNEY GUREWITZ CLEMENS'S Motion To Strike Request For Trial De Novo Of Defendant Conlan Press, Inc. is denied on the grounds that the corporation is no longer suspended. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Continued To Jan-09-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Re Ntc Of Continued Motion And Motion To Strike Request For Trial De Novo Of Deft Conlan Press, Inc
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Continued To Dec-03-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SYDNEY GUREWITZ CLEMENS' Re-noticed Motion To Strike Request For Trial De Novo Of Defendant Conlan Press, Inc. is continued to December 3, 2012 to give defendant an opportunity to pay its back taxes and obtain a certificate of revivor from the Secretary of State. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Strike Req. For Trial De Novo Of Deft Conlan Press, Inc. Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Oct-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF SYDNEY GUREWITZ CLEMENS' Motion To Strike Request For Trial De Novo Of Defendant Conlan Press, Inc is continued to October 22, 2012 to give Plaintiff Clemens the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff Clemens must deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than 4pm October 12, 2012, or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of Defendant Conlon Press' opposition papers. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
